---
title: "Jonah Dratfield"
description: "Contributor to nycOpenData and NYC Open Data Week 2026"
---

## Project

-   [Social Infrastructure & Well-Being](../nyc-open-data-2026/02-Final-Social-Infrastructure-and-Well-Being-Jonah.qmd)

## Links

-   [GitHub](https://github.com/jdratfield38)\
-   [LinkedIn](https://www.linkedin.com/in/jonah-dratfield-932584167/)\
-   [ORCID](https://orcid.org/0009-0005-6153-2590)
